title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 14–17, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The crew follows Nami’s trail toward the island ruled by Arlong and begins to learn how dangerous her home is.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shahahaha! What're you being so reserved now for!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As they say, money makes the world go round!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: captain of the wrong pirates "ARLONG THE SAW" (sawshark-type fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Money's good!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's nothing more reliable than money! Ain't that right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: certainly.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I despise humans but men and women like you who get how this world works are a different matter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...well if business is over, I'll have to get going now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hig...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It'd be bad to have my ship docked in a place like this in the middle of its patrol...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're always in a hurry, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You should stay awhile and drink with me every now and then! Live a little!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If anyone rats you out to head- quarters, I'll kill him for ya.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: No, it's fine... excuse me then.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey, the captain's on his way back!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: escort him out to his ship!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: YESIR!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Get on the octopus pot, I'll give you a lift!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes... thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: ARLONG PIRATES! CREIPER HACCHAN (Octopus-type fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You sure do have a funny-looking face, not to mention even your name is nezumi. [mout]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: C'mon! Your face alone is enough of a joke already! Ahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: HACH!! Watch that mouth of yours! The captain is our valued client.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, right. Sorry 'bout that. Well, get on then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My bad, captain! That one's got a mouth on him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: N-No... it's fine, chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: These Fishmen give me the creeps...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...but their money's good.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong Park's East Gates

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey, you! Stop right there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm going to kill Arlong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He killed my dad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So if you don't get outta my way, I'll kill you too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm serious!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
